\noindent The cross-correlation plot in Figure 5.7 is
created by running:

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}%
}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
x = USSteamCoEstim['production'].to_numpy()
y = USSteamCoEstim['revenue'].to_numpy()
max_lag = 4
lags = np.arange(-max_lag, max_lag + 1)
corrs = []
for lag in lags:
    if lag < 0:
        corr = np.corrcoef(x[:lag], y[-lag:])[0, 1]
    elif lag > 0:
        corr = np.corrcoef(x[lag:], y[:-lag])[0, 1]
    else:
        corr = np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1]
    corrs.append(corr)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 4))
ax.stem(lags, corrs, basefmt=' ')
ax.set_xlabel('Lag')
ax.set_ylabel('Cross-correlation')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}
